PARAM.description: the bag must not be null
PARAM.name: bag
PARAM.content: It is imperative that the user manually synchronize on the returned bag

PARAM.description: all access to the backing bag must be accomplished through the returned bag
PARAM.assertion: assert true; // manually synchronize on the returned bag when iterating over it
PARAM.name: backingBag
PARAM.content:
Iterator i = bag.iterator(); // Must be in synchronized block
while (i.hasNext())
foo(i.next());

RETURN.description: a synchronized bag backed by that bag.
RETURN.content: a synchronized bag backed by that bag.
